title: Phase 31BW — Qwen2.5-1.5B Corrected Q2_K Broader Layer Probe Planning
scope: planning-only. No validation execution in 31BW. No model load. No Q2_K / SDIR artifacts. No generation / inference / runtime integration. No commit/push/tag without explicit Matt approval.
forbidden_actions_upheld: no Q2_K / SDIR blobs generated or committed
no commit/push/tag without explicit Matt approval

A.name: Option A — 7-layer stratified probe
A.purpose: broad coverage without full sweep; stratified ~every 4 layers + final layer (27) preserves top-of-network, mid, and end positions

estimate.disk_artifacts_committed: none (all in tempfile.mkdtemp + memory; cleaned at exit, per 31BU/31BV pattern)
estimate.claim_boundary_if_fail: no claim; results preserved as audit context for next phase planning

B.purpose: stronger coverage (every other layer); still not full aggregate

estimate.claim_boundary_if_pass: approaching aggregate — would qualify as 'broader probe', not full aggregate validation
estimate.claim_boundary_if_fail: no claim; results preserved as audit context for next phase planning

C.purpose: full layer coverage at two seeds; higher runtime and scope risk

estimate.claim_boundary_if_pass: approaching aggregate — would qualify as 'broader probe', not full aggregate validation

rationale: 31BU + 31BV together show the policy is robust at layer 0, layer 14, and layer 27 (3 of 28 layers = ~10.7% coverage, all pass).
Per-layer margin variance is 26 bytes across 3 layers → memory economics are NOT the binding constraint; broader sweeps are safe on memory.
31BV ran 6 pairs in ~240 sec wall clock (~40 sec/pair). Option A = 14 pairs ≈ 9 min, well within tolerance for a single-session run.
Option A is stratified sampling: 0, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 27 = covers positions L0 (top), L4, L8, L12, L16, L20, L27 (end). 7 layers with stride 4 plus the final layer preserves top/mid/end sampling.

Option A's claim boundary stays clearly 'stratified probe' (14 pairs, 7 of 28 layers = 25% layer coverage). It does NOT cross into aggregate territory (which would require 28+ layers at multiple seeds).

Option B (14 layers) would cross into 'half-model probe' territory — useful but a larger scope step from 31BV (3 layers → 14 layers = 4.7x). 31BV was 2x scope step from 31BU. Stepping 2x → 2x → 4.7x is uneven.
Option C (full 28 layers) would be aggregate validation territory — explicitly forbidden by 31BW spec.
Option D (seed sensitivity) does not add layer coverage; it re-tests the same 3 layers 31BV already tested. Useful as a follow-up, but lower priority than layer coverage.

rejected_options.B: Step from 3 → 14 layers is too large for one phase; 31BV was 1 → 3 layers. Save B for after A passes, as a follow-up.
rejected_options.C: Full 28-layer sweep = aggregate validation, explicitly forbidden by 31BW spec. Would also be ~37 min wall clock and cross the claim boundary.
rejected_options.D: Seed sensitivity probe does not add layer coverage; re-tests 3 layers 31BV already covered. Lower priority than layer coverage step.

selected_next_phase.name: Phase 31BX — Qwen2.5-1.5B Corrected Q2_K Stratified Layer Probe
selected_next_phase.policy: corrected_q2k_policy_v1 (corrected_ceil_per_row Q2_K, ffn_up+ffn_gate SDIR k=0.5%, alpha=1.0, ffn_down W_low only — no ffn_down residual)

success_criteria_for_31BX.regression_passes: PASS_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_RUNTIME_CLEAN, error_count=0, fallback_count=0, readme_drift_guard.passed=true (before AND after)
success_criteria_for_31BX.all_pairs_finite: All 14 pairs produce finite Y_ref, Y_low, Y_sub
success_criteria_for_31BX.no_blobs_committed: no Q2_K / SDIR / temp blobs in commit
success_criteria_for_31BX.no_scope_creep: layers and seeds exactly as approved; no layer added, no seed added

classification_rules_for_31BX.PASS_31BX_1_5B_Q2K_STRATIFIED_LAYER_PROB: all 14 pairs pass all criteria; no severe regressions; all finite; all memory-positive; >= 12/14 cosine-improved; >= 12/14 MAE-improved
classification_rules_for_31BX.PARTIAL_31BX_1_5B_Q2K_STRATIFIED_LAYER_P: all pairs finite and memory-positive; some pairs have minor cosine/MAE failures but no severe regressions
cosine/MAE tradeoffs present (some layers improve cosine, some improve MAE, no layer severely regresses both)
any selected layer is memory-negative under current accounting

stop_conditions_for_31BX: regression failure at any point (pre-flight or post-edit)
model file tracking issue (file missing, wrong file, different quantization)
non-finite Y_ref / Y_low / Y_sub on any pair
scope creep (extra layer, extra seed, extra family, aggregate-style sweep)
any claim trigger: inference, generation, runtime, production, speedup, quality, behavior, llama.cpp integration, larger-model validation

allowed_claims_if_31BX_passes.primary: Corrected Q2_K policy remains memory-positive and improves cosine/MAE across a stratified 1.5B standalone tensor-harness probe (7 layers: 0, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 27; 2 seeds: 0, 9; 14 pairs).
secondary: Per-layer margin is consistent across the stratified layer set (variance bounded by 31BV's 26 bytes/layer observation).
The mixed source-GGUF ffn_down quant types (L0/L27 Q6_K, L14 Q4_K) do not affect corrected Q2_K memory accounting.
forbidden_still: no full larger-model validation claim (7 of 28 layers ≠ 28 layers)
no claim that 1.5B behaves like 0.5B (no 0.5B comparison)

interpretation: 31BW is a planning phase: it does not run validation. It evaluates four candidate next-scope options (A=7-layer stratified, B=14-layer half-model, C=full 28-layer aggregate, D=seed sensitivity probe) using grounded cost estimates from 31BV's observed per-pair time (~40 sec) and per-layer margin variance (26 bytes). It recommends Option A (7 layers × 2 seeds = 14 pairs) as the safest next executable phase: stratified layer coverage with stride 4 + final layer, scope step 2x from 31BV (3 → 7 layers), runtime ~9 min, and a claim boundary that stays clearly 'stratified probe' rather than approaching aggregate. Options B, C, D are explicitly rejected with rationale. The next allowed phase (if 31BW is approved) is 31BX.
classification_reason: Option A selected cleanly: 7 layers (0, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 27) × 2 seeds = 14 pairs, estimated ~9 min wall clock (14 pairs × ~40 sec/pair from 31BV observation), no aggregate territory, no scope creep, claim boundary stays 'stratified probe'.
next_allowed_phase_if_clean: Phase 31BX — Qwen2.5-1.5B Corrected Q2_K Stratified Layer Probe, only if explicitly requested
next_allowed_phase_if_blocked: Phase 31BW-R — Broader Probe Planning Repair, only if explicitly requested
